title: CRSP to Report Q4 Earnings: Is a Beat in Store for the Stock?
text: CRISPR Therapeutics Q4 2024 Earnings Preview. Earnings Expectations: Market expectations were for CRISPR Therapeutics to report Q4 2024 earnings after market close on February 12, 2025. The Zacks Consensus Estimate was for a loss of $1.20 per share, compared to earnings of $1.10 per share in the year-ago quarter. Revenue Expectations: Total revenue consensus stood at $10 million for the fourth quarter, down from the prior year's $201.2 million which included large milestone payments from Vertex Pharmaceuticals. Key Business Drivers: The quarter's results would be influenced by CASGEVY commercialization progress, including the number of authorized treatment centers (ATCs) activated and patient enrollment metrics. Management was expected to discuss the company's cash position and runway, following the $280 million capital raise in February 2024. Clinical Updates Expected: The company was expected to provide updates on its pipeline programs, particularly CTX112 CAR-T therapy and in vivo programs CTX310 and CTX320. Stock Performance Context: CRSP shares had declined over the previous quarters amid broader biotech weakness and cautious investor sentiment regarding CASGEVY commercial uptake.
